name: mycelium_outreach_status
description: Get outreach pipeline status for a project — contact counts per status, active campaigns.

name: mycelium_outreach_contacts
description: List outreach contacts. Filter by project, status, type.

status.description: Filter by status (discovered, researched, draft_ready, approved, sent, followed_up, replied, covered, closed)

name: mycelium_outreach_campaign
description: Create or update an outreach campaign for a project.

persona_prompt.description: System prompt for Claude pitch generation

project_facts.description: Project facts for Claude to reference

config.description: JSON string of campaign config (API keys, search queries, limits)

name: mycelium_outreach_discover
description: Run contact discovery for a campaign — searches YouTube for creators and Hunter.io for press contacts.

campaign_id.description: Campaign ID to run discovery for

name: mycelium_outreach_research
description: Research a contact — fetch their latest YouTube video or press article.

name: mycelium_outreach_personalize
description: Generate a Claude-personalized pitch for a contact using their campaign persona and templates.

contact_id.description: Contact ID to personalize pitch for

name: mycelium_outreach_approve
description: Approve a draft pitch for sending. Optionally edit subject/body.

name: mycelium_outreach_send
description: Send an approved pitch to a contact via Gmail. Set dry_run=false to actually send.

contact_id.description: Contact ID to send pitch to

name: mycelium_outreach_followup
description: Send a follow-up email to a contact whose pitch was sent but not replied to.

contact_id.description: Contact ID to follow up with
